query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white composite portrait showing a man in profile facing left in the left portion of the frame, with a second translucent frontal-facing portrait of the same man layered to the right, both set against a solid dark background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black-and-white composite portrait with a surreal double-exposure effect, where a sharp profile view of a man facing left overlaps with a blurred, translucent frontal-facing portrait of the same man to the right, creating a ghostly, dreamlike layering against a dark void.
